notes: Minimal server-rendered HTML with table-based layout. No JavaScript frameworks, no Shadow DOM, no dynamic loading. Extremely simple DOM structure. All links are plain anchor tags. One of the simplest modern websites to parse.

endpoints.label: Login Link
endpoints.description: Top-right login link redirecting to login form page

endpoints.label: Header Navigation
endpoints.description: Top bar links: new, past, comments, ask, show, jobs, submit

endpoints.label: Story Links
endpoints.description: List of 30 story titles linking to external URLs or internal discussion pages

endpoints.label: Story Metadata
endpoints.description: Per-story metadata: points, author, timestamp, comment count — inline within table rows, not a standalone navigation pattern

endpoints.label: More Link (Pagination)
endpoints.description: Bottom 'More' link for loading next page of stories
